name: Loan for Any Purpose
description_short: Sandy Springs, GA's Loan for Any Purpose at 5826 Roswell Rd offers quick payday and title loans with flexible hours.
description_long:
Loan for Any Purpose is located at 5826 Roswell Rd NE STE 100 in Sandy Springs, GA, a convenient destination for residents seeking fast financial solutions. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 7 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9 AM to 6 PM, making it accessible for those with varying schedules. The Sandy Springs location serves the local community with a straightforward, transparent approach to emergency lending.

At this Sandy Springs branch, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term financial products to cover unexpected expenses. Call 404-334-5778 to discuss your borrowing needs, loan terms, and approval timelines with a loan specialist. The staff can explain all available options and guide you through the application process without pressure or complexity.

When visiting the Sandy Springs location at 5826 Roswell Rd NE, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and your Social Security number to speed up approval. Most applicants can receive same-day or next-day funding if approved, making this a practical choice when you need cash quickly in GA. Loan for Any Purpose focuses on straightforward lending without the bureaucracy of traditional banks.
address: 5826 Roswell Rd NE STE 100, Sandy Springs, GA 30328

company_info.headquarters: 5826 Roswell Rd NE STE 100, Sandy Springs, GA 30328

pros: All credit types accepted on most products including cash advances, title loans, installment loans, and bad credit loans
Application does not affect FICO score — soft pull only
Wide borrowing range from $250 up to $50,000 depending on product
Same-day loans available with fast approval and minimal documentation required
Both secured (title loan) and unsecured (personal, installment) loan options under one roof
In-person branch service in Detroit for borrowers who prefer face-to-face lending
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fees disclosed on the website — borrowers cannot compare costs before applying
May pull from non-traditional consumer reporting agencies, which can show on that agency's profile even if FICO is unaffected
Company explicitly states products are not intended for long-term financial needs — consistent with high-cost short-term lending
Qualification not guaranteed despite 'all credit types welcome' marketing language
State availability and product terms vary but are not detailed on the website
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers with bad or limited credit who need fast cash and prefer in-person service
Vehicle owners looking for title loans up to $50,000 without a hard credit pull on application
Borrowers who need same-day or next-day emergency funds with minimal paperwork
Working adults who need to visit a lender outside standard 9–5 business hours
diagnosis: Best suited for Detroit-area borrowers with poor or no credit who need quick access to cash — from a $250 payday advance up to a $50,000 title or personal loan — and value extended branch hours and a no-FICO-impact application. The primary caveat is that no rates or fees are published, so the true cost of borrowing is unknown until after applying, and these products are explicitly positioned as short-term solutions rather than affordable long-term credit.
services: Cash advance loans (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, all credit types)
Title loans (up to $50,000, vehicle-secured, all credit types)
Bad credit loans ($250–$50,000, all credit types)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, unsecured, higher credit recommended)
In-person branch lending at Detroit and Atlanta locations
Online loan application with identity verification
